name: Galimmo SCA
summary: Galimmo SCA operates as a real estate company in Europe. As of June 30, 2019, it manages a portfolio of 52 shopping malls. The company was formerly known as C&Co SCA and changed its name to Galimmo SCA in September 2016. Galimmo SCA was founded in 1902 and is based in Paris, France. Galimmo SCA is a subsidiary of Galimmo Real Estate.
